summary: Bucket race-skipped invoice ingest results into skipped (not ingested); reclaim stale ReserveHash sentinels older than 30 minutes so crashed runs do not permanently quarantine a file.
reason: Two issues in one Greptile P1 finding on the original TOCTOU fix: (1) the aggregation loop only special-cased status=duplicate, so race-skipped sentinel results landed in ingested without an expense_id, inflating the uploaded count; (2) if a run crashed between ReserveHash and ConfirmHash/ReleaseHash, the sentinel row was orphaned forever and every retry returned race-skipped until the user discovered --force. Fix (1): bucket by status != uploaded. Fix (2): ReserveHash now reclaims sentinels older than ReservationTTL (default 30 min) before inserting a fresh row.
validated_outcome: TestReserveHash_ReclaimsStaleSentinel + TestReserveHash_DoesNotReclaimFreshSentinel + the existing parallel-claim regression all pass.
